verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: God is able to make all grace abound to you. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So that in all things, At all times, So that in all things, Having all that you need.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You will abound, in every good thing, Abound, having all that you need, Abound, in every good deed, You'll abound.
